sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16666" key="a)strono/mhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρονόμ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n16666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observation of the stars,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg030.perseus-grc1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
